title: E1: Return water sensor open/short
summary: Fault code E1 indicates return water temperature sensor (TH1) open or short circuit. All peripherals are shut down.

structured_payload.description: 回水感温线路/ 开路

evidence_quote: 1 TH1 回水感温线路/ 开路  E1 关闭所有外设

title: E2: Outlet water sensor open/short
summary: Fault code E2 indicates outlet water temperature sensor (TH2) open or short circuit. All peripherals are shut down.

structured_payload.description: 出水感温线路/ 开路

evidence_quote: 2 TH2 出水感温线路/ 开路  E2 关闭所有外设

title: E3: Return air sensor open/short
summary: Fault code E3 indicates return air temperature sensor (TH3) open or short circuit. All peripherals are shut down.

structured_payload.description: 回风感温线路/ 开路

evidence_quote: 3 TH3 回风感温线路/ 开路  E3 关闭所有外设

title: E4: Defrost sensor 1 short/open
summary: Fault code E4 indicates defrost temperature sensor 1 (TH4) short or open circuit. All peripherals are shut down.
evidence_quote: 4 TH4 除霜感温线 1短 /开路 E4 关闭所有外设

title: E5: Defrost sensor 2 short/open (dual compressor)
summary: Fault code E5 indicates defrost temperature sensor 2 (TH5) short or open circuit on dual compressor units. All peripherals are shut down.
evidence_quote: 5 TH5 除霜感温线 2短 /开路 E5 关闭所有外设

title: E6: Electric heater overload / Compressor 2 high pressure (dual)
summary: Fault code E6 indicates electric heater overload (single compressor) or compressor 2 high pressure (dual compressor). Only electric heating is shut down.

structured_payload.description: 电加热过载 (single) / 压缩机 2高压 报警 (dual)

evidence_quote: 6 OVHT/HP2 电加热过载 E6 仅关闭电加热

title: E7: Insufficient water flow
summary: Fault code E7 indicates insufficient water flow. All peripherals are shut down.
evidence_quote: 7 FLOW 水流量不足 E7 关闭所有外设

title: E8: Water pump overload
summary: Fault code E8 indicates water pump overload. All peripherals are shut down.
evidence_quote: 8 OV-PUMP 水泵过载 E8 关闭所有外设

title: E9: Fan overload
summary: Fault code E9 indicates fan overload. All peripherals are shut down.
evidence_quote: 9 OV-FAN 风机过载 E9 关闭所有外设

title: EA: Compressor 1 overload (single) / Compressor 1 overload (dual)
summary: Fault code EA indicates compressor 1 overload. On single compressor units, only electric heating is shut down; on dual compressor units, only compressor 1 is shut down.

structured_payload.description: 压缩机过载 (single) / 压缩机 1过载 (dual)
structured_payload.action: 仅关闭电加热 (single) / 仅关闭压缩机 1 (dual)

evidence_quote: 10 OV-COMP1 压缩机过载 EA 仅关闭电加热

title: EB: Compressor 2 overload (dual compressor)
summary: Fault code EB indicates compressor 2 overload on dual compressor units. Only compressor 2 is shut down.
evidence_quote: 11 OV-COMP2 压缩机 2过载  EB 仅关闭压缩机 2

title: EC: Compressor 1 high pressure (single/dual)
summary: Fault code EC indicates compressor 1 high pressure. On single compressor units, only electric heating is shut down; on dual compressor units, only compressor 1 is shut down.

structured_payload.description: 压缩机高压报警 (single) / 压缩机 1高压 报警 (dual)
structured_payload.action: 仅关闭电加热 (single) / 仅关闭压缩机 1 (dual)

evidence_quote: 11 HP1 压缩机高压报警 EC 仅关闭电加热

title: ED: Compressor 1 low pressure (single/dual)
summary: Fault code ED indicates compressor 1 low pressure. On single compressor units, only electric heating is shut down; on dual compressor units, only compressor 1 is shut down.

structured_payload.description: 压缩机低压报警 (single) / 压缩机 1低压 报警 (dual)
structured_payload.action: 仅关闭电加热 (single) / 仅关闭压缩机 1 (dual)

evidence_quote: 12 LP1 压缩机低压报警 ED 仅关闭电加热

title: EE: Memory access fault (single) / Compressor 2 low pressure (dual)
summary: Fault code EE indicates memory access fault on single compressor units (all peripherals shut down) or compressor 2 low pressure on dual compressor units (only compressor 2 shut down).

structured_payload.description: 存储器存取故障 (single) / 压缩机 2低压 报警 (dual)
structured_payload.action: 关闭所有外设 (single) / 仅关闭压缩机 2 (dual)

evidence_quote: 13 U6 存储器存取故障 EE 关闭所有外设

title: EF: Cooling outlet water temperature too low
summary: Fault code EF indicates cooling outlet water temperature is too low. Compressor and pump auxiliary heating are shut down.

structured_payload.action: 关压缩机水泵辅助加热运行

evidence_quote: 14 …… 制冷出水温度过低 EF 关压缩机水泵辅助加热运行
